sub_lemmas.name: omega_completeness_prime_exhaustiveness_prime_exhaustiveness
sub_lemmas.prime_insight: Completeness = Prime exhaustiveness (no more primes can be added)
sub_lemmas.proof_strategy: Use bijection between primes and ℕ, apply prime density theorems

prime_grounding.completeness_insight: Ω is complete (union of all possible infinite axioms)
prime_grounding.bijection_insight: Perfect bijection between Omega axioms and primes
